DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-25-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEAN KING'S MOTION REQUESTING MONETARY SANCTIONS AND FINDING OF CONTEMPT UNTIL NONPARTY INDOOR RESTORE ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. COMPLIES WITH THE COURTS ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS MOTION TO COMPEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED. THE COURTS FINDS THAT THE SUBPOENA HAS NOT BEEN COMPLIED WITH. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NONPARTY INDOOR RESTORE ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. SHALL PAY $1,000 IN SANCTIONS AND FULLY COMPLY WITH THE SUBPOENA BY APRIL 12, 2021. INDOOR RESTORE IS ALSO HELD IN CONTEMPT UNDER CCP 2023.030(E) AND 2025.480(K) FOR FAILING TO COMPLY WITH THE SUBPOENA AND A PRIOR COURT ORDER. THE CONTEMPT FINDING WILL BE DISCHARGED IF INDOOR RESTORE COMPLIES THE SUBPOENA AND PAYS THE SANCTIONS. THE COURT WILL HOLD A FURTHER HEARING ON APRIL 20, 2021 @ 9AM TO CONFIRM INDOOR RESTORE'S COMPLIANCE. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-06-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEAN KING'S MOTION REQUESTING MONETARY SANCTIONS AND FINDING OF CONTEMPT UNTIL NONPARTY INDOOR RESTORE ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES, INC. COMPLIES WITH THE COURT'S ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NONPARTY INDOOR RESTORE ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES WAS PREVIOUSLY HELD IN CONTEMPT FOR FAILING TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANTS' SUBPOENA, HOWEVER, THE COURT STATED THAT THE CONTEMPT FINDING WOULD BE DISCHARGED IF INDOOR RESTORE COMPLIED WITH THE SUBPOENA BY THE LAST HEARING DATE. DEFENDANT ADVISES THAT INDOOR RESTORE CONTINUES TO FAIL TO COMPLY, AND AS SUCH, THE COURT FINDS THAT INDOOR RESTORE IS IN CONTEMPT AND AWARDS DEFENDANT $3,513 IN SANCTIONS. INDOOR RESTORE IS REQUIRED TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS AND COMPLY WITH THE SUBPOENA BY MAY 21, 2021. THE COURT WILL HOLD ANOTHER HEARING ON JUNE 3, 2021 IN DEPARTMENT 301 AT 9:00 AM. INDOOR RESTORE IS ORDERED TO APPEAR ON THAT DAY AND CONFIRM THAT ALL SANCTIONS HAVE BEEN PAID AND THE SUBPOENA COMPLIED WITH. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL RESULT IN ADDITIONAL SIGNIFICANT SANCTIONS BEING IMPOSED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
